bird.name: Prigogine's greenbul
bird.summary: Prigogine's greenbul (Chlorocichla prigoginei) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found only in eastern Dem…

relations.subject: Prigogine's greenbul
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Prigogine's greenbul
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
